languages.text: "Регистрирую ультра- и инфразвуковые волны, в теории, способные воздействовать на органические центры мозга".

traits.locale_text: "Регистрирую ультра- и инфразвуковые волны, в теории, способные воздействовать на органические центры мозга".

languages.text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."
languages.original_text: "Регистрирую ультра- и инфразвуковые волны, в теории, способные воздействовать на органические центры мозга".

traits.locale_text: "I register the presence of ultra- and infrasonic wave frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon the organic cerebral centres."
"I register the presence of ultra- and infrasonic wave frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon the organic cerebral centres."
"I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."
"I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."
"I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

languages.text: «Registro frecuencias tanto ultra como infrasónicas. En teoría, estas emisiones pueden inducir efectos deletéreos en un cerebro orgánico».
languages.original_text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

traits.locale_text: «Registro frecuencias tanto ultra como infrasónicas. En teoría, estas emisiones pueden inducir efectos deletéreos en un cerebro orgánico».

languages.text: “我同时记录到超声波与次声波频段。理论上，此类辐射足以对有机体大脑诱发有害效应。”
languages.original_text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

traits.locale_text: “我同时记录到超声波与次声波频段。理论上，此类辐射足以对有机体大脑诱发有害效应。”

languages.text: « J'enregistre des fréquences ultrasons et infrasons. En théorie, de telles émissions peuvent induire des effets néfastes sur les cerveaux organiques. »
languages.original_text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

traits.locale_text: « J'enregistre des fréquences ultrasons et infrasons. En théorie, de telles émissions peuvent induire des effets néfastes sur les cerveaux organiques. »

languages.text: "Hem ultra hem de infrasonik frekanslar kaydediyorum. Teorik olarak bu tür yayınlar, organik beyinler üzerinde zararlı etkilere yol açabilir."
languages.original_text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

traits.locale_text: "Hem ultra hem de infrasonik frekanslar kaydediyorum. Teorik olarak bu tür yayınlar, organik beyinler üzerinde zararlı etkilere yol açabilir."

languages.text: "Ich registriere Ultra- und Infraschallfrequenzen. Theoretisch können derartige Emissionen organische Gehirne ernsthaft schädigen."
languages.original_text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

traits.locale_text: "Ich registriere Ultra- und Infraschallfrequenzen. Theoretisch können derartige Emissionen organische Gehirne ernsthaft schädigen."

languages.text: 「超音波と超低音波の両方を感知しています。理論上、このような放出は有機的な脳に有害な影響を与える可能性があります。」
languages.original_text: "I register both ultra- and infrasonic frequencies. Theoretically, such emissions are capable of inducing deleterious effects upon organic brains."

traits.locale_text: 「超音波と超低音波の両方を感知しています。理論上、このような放出は有機的な脳に有害な影響を与える可能性があります。」
